Package com.wip.controller

Class TrackingUpdateController

java.lang.Object
com.wip.controller.TrackingUpdateController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/shipments") public class TrackingUpdateController extends Object
REST controller for managing tracking updates associated with shipments.

Exposes RESTful endpoints nested under /api/shipments/{shipmentId}/tracking-updates that allow authorised clients to record and retrieve real-time status updates for a given shipment. Each tracking update captures a location, timestamp, and status milestone (e.g., "In Transit", "Out for Delivery", "Delivered") for the shipment's journey. This controller shares the /api/shipments base path with ShipmentController and focuses exclusively on the tracking-update sub-resource.

Since:
1.0
Version:
1.0
Author:
Dharshan K S (dharshan.ks@wipro.com)

  • Constructor Details

    • TrackingUpdateController

      public TrackingUpdateController(TrackingUpdateService trackingUpdateService)
      Constructs a TrackingUpdateController with the required TrackingUpdateService.
      Parameters:
      trackingUpdateService - the service bean responsible for tracking update business logic; injected automatically by Spring's dependency injection container

  • Method Details

    • addTrackingUpdate

      @PostMapping("/{shipmentId}/tracking-updates") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<TrackingUpdateDto> addTrackingUpdate(@PathVariable Long shipmentId, @Valid @RequestBody @Valid TrackingUpdateDto trackingUpdateDto)
      Records a new tracking update for the specified shipment.

      Accepts a validated TrackingUpdateDto request body and associates it with the shipment identified by shipmentId. The update is persisted and the resulting DTO (including the generated ID and timestamp) is returned in the response. Only administrators should be authorised to post tracking updates.

      Parameters:
      shipmentId - the unique identifier of the shipment to which the tracking update belongs; must refer to an existing shipment
      trackingUpdateDto - the data transfer object containing update details such as location, status, and description; must pass all Bean Validation constraints
      Returns:
      a ResponseEntity containing the saved TrackingUpdateDto with HTTP 200
      Throws:
      ResourceNotFoundException - if no shipment exists with the given ID (HTTP 404)

    • getTrackingUpdatesByShipmentId

      @GetMapping("/{shipmentId}/tracking-updates") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<TrackingUpdateDto>> getTrackingUpdatesByShipmentId(@PathVariable Long shipmentId)
      Retrieves all tracking updates recorded for a specific shipment.

      Returns the complete chronological list of tracking update events associated with the shipment identified by shipmentId. Each entry represents a discrete status change or location checkpoint during the delivery journey. An empty list is returned if no updates have been recorded yet.

      Parameters:
      shipmentId - the unique identifier of the shipment whose tracking updates are requested
      Returns:
      a ResponseEntity containing a List of TrackingUpdateDto objects ordered by their recorded timestamp, with HTTP 200
      Throws:
      ResourceNotFoundException - if no shipment exists with the given ID (HTTP 404)
